faqData.question: Do I need to confirm RSVP?
faqData.answer: Yes — so we can count how many guests are coming and plan seating and meals. Please RSVP by April 16, 2026.

faqData.question: What is the dress code?
faqData.answer: We kindly ask guests to wear formal or semi-formal attire. Please avoid white so the bride can stand out.

faqData.question: Ceremony time and venue?
faqData.answer: Ceremony at 10:00 AM — St. James the Greater Parish. Reception lunch at 12:00 PM — Missio Dei Hotel. Wedding program continues from 1:00 PM onwards.
